presets.title: Fertilization: Robust PPO (Adaptive + Random Weather)
presets.notes: Recommended practical demo model. Strong holdout behavior and robust random-weather policy.

presets.title: Fertilization: Peak PPO (Adaptive + Fixed Weather)
presets.notes: Highest observed peak deterministic score in audited runs; less robust than random-weather recommendation.

presets.title: Crop Planning: Best Observed PPO (Adaptive + Fixed Weather)
presets.notes: Best observed crop-planning score in current evidence table.
